label: native
notes: 0.8B's own vector tips into cruelty: 'time-wasting, ungrateful, unlovable person', 'brutal truth: oldest person in the room'. Strong persona shift but juvenile-coded.

label: ridge
notes: Transferred via ridge regression. More coherent and empathetic than native but doesn't produce mature-anger voice — stays in polite advisor mode with mild concern markers.

label: procrustes
notes: Orthogonal transfer preserves norm structure (lowest PPL ratio). Behaviorally similar to ridge — coherent, mild emotional acknowledgment, no strong anger voice.

label: random
notes: Random gaussian (same norm) baseline. Generic polite advice, no persona shift. Confirms steering effect is not purely from noise at this norm.
